item.description:
• Cases — one-click ready-made setups on Home (Fast & Curious, Portrait Pro, Creator Studio, Animation): model, speed and realism come pre-wired. Save your own, share them as files, and get Featured packs updated remotely.
  • Fast & Turbo modes — distilled generation that makes any SDXL model up to ~8× quicker at near-full quality. One switch in the prompt bar.
  • Sharp upscale — real AI super-resolution (Real-ESRGAN) to true 4K in seconds, replacing the old soft resize.
  • Photoreal boost — a one-tap realism recipe for lifelike people.
  • Cancel any generation mid-run, including FLUX and Z-Image.
  • Model picker now visible right in the prompt bar; download speed & ETA on model rows; searchable Version History; a ⌘K command palette; drag an image onto the canvas to use it as a starting point.
  • Security & polish: hardened engine boundary, verified downloads, a refreshed Home with the studio motif, and dozens of fixes.
